- orange petals
- green leaves in the background
- small reddish-brown central structure/stem area
</features>
<kb>
- IF petals are orange THEN class 45
- IF petals are purple THEN class 44
- IF petals are pink or white THEN class 77
</kb>

</rule_check>

<response>45</response>
